mapper.update: UPDATE sys_file_object SET ref_count = ref_count + 1 WHERE file_hash = #{_parameter} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_file_object SET ref_count = ref_count - 1 WHERE file_hash = #{_parameter} AND ref_count > 1 AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_file_object WHERE file_hash = #{_parameter} AND ref_count = 1 AND is_deleted = 0
